title: verbascum × edessanum
intro: Verbascum × edessanum, also known as Edessan mullein, is a sterile hybrid plant derived from the Verbascum thapsus and Verbascum phlomoides species. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat skin conditions such as wounds, burns, and eczema. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, soothing sore throats, and promoting relaxation due to its sedative properties. In herbal preparations, Verbascum × edessanum is often used in teas, infusions, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
